title: Brand Pages — Add İlgili Hizmetlerimiz to pages with external link-cards
description:
For brand pages that already have external link-card sections (## 🌟 ... Hizmetlerimiz with class="link-card featured"), add a new "## İlgili Hizmetlerimiz" CardGroup section with internal Mintlify links.

The external link-card sections already reveal the service relationship. For example:
- If a page has "## 🌟 Isı Pompası Hizmetlerimiz" → relevant service is /hizmetlerimiz/isi-pompalari
- If it has "## 🌟 Yerden Isıtma Hizmetlerimiz" → relevant service is /hizmetlerimiz/yerden-isitma-sistemleri
- If it has "## 🌟 Güneş Enerjisi Hizmetlerimiz" → relevant service is /hizmetlerimiz/gunes-enerjisi
- If it has "## 🌟 Bodrum Hidrofor Hizmetlerimiz" → relevant service is /hizmetlerimiz/hidrofor-sistemleri
- If it has "## 🌟 Su Deposu Hizmetlerimiz" → relevant service is /hizmetlerimiz/su-depolari

Add the "## İlgili Hizmetlerimiz" section BEFORE or AFTER the existing external link-card section(s). Keep the external link-cards intact.

Pages to process: demirdokum.mdx, eca.mdx, lg.mdx, general.mdx, toshiba.mdx, rehau.mdx, panasonic.mdx, grundfos.mdx, honeywell.mdx, wilo.mdx, wepomp.mdx, solimpeks.mdx, hakan-plastik.mdx, vesbo.mdx, jinko.mdx, siemens.mdx, eds.mdx, fronius.mdx, standart.mdx, mega.mdx, teksan.mdx, yelkenci.mdx, eraslan.mdx

Each Card should use: <Card title="Service Name" href="/hizmetlerimiz/{slug}"></Card> (omit icon unless a matching service icon image exists).

summary: Added `## İlgili Hizmetlerimiz` `<CardGroup>` sections to all 23 brand `.mdx` files in `markalar/`. Each section contains `<Card>` components linking to internal Mintlify service pages (Isı Pompaları, Yerden Isıtma Sistemleri, Güneş Enerjisi Sistemleri, Hidrofor Sistemleri, Su Depoları) derived from the existing external link-card sections on each page. Single-section pages got 1 Card; multi-section pages (rehau, grundfos, wilo, wepomp, standart, yelkenci) got 2-3 Cards; special-case pages (panasonic, solimpeks) got 2 Cards. All existing external link-card sections preserved intact. All changes committed, working tree clean.
